# INNotebookItemType.taskList

**Case**

A task list item type.

## Declaration

```swift
case taskList
```

## Discussion

Search your app’s task lists and return each one using an [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INTaskList] object. Task lists are a way of grouping related tasks together.

## Enumeration Cases

- **INNotebookItemType.unknown**: An unknown type of item.
- **INNotebookItemType.note**: A note item type.
- **INNotebookItemType.task**: A task item type.
title: INNotebookItemType.taskList
